itemData.secDescrText: Conjure surging arcane energy to restore your Mana. While active, enemies you kill affected by [ElementalAilments|Elemental Ailments] have a chance to spawn a Mana [Remnant], and [Critical|Critically Hitting] a target with [ElementalAilments|Elemental Ailments] spawns a Mana [Remnant] every few seconds. Picking up a Mana [Remnant] grants you Mana which can [Overflow|Overflow] maximum Mana.

stats: 20% chance for Supported Skills to create an additional [Remnant]
[Remnant|Remnants] created by Supported Skills can be collected from 35% further away

itemData.descrText: Place into a Skill's Support Gem socket in the Skills Panel to apply its effects to that Skill. You cannot have multiple Support Gems of the same Category socketed within one Skill.
